title: Wadia Ghandy & Co elevates 9 lawyers to Partnership
description: Wadia Ghandy & Co has announced the elevation of nine lawyers to Partnership across its New Delhi, Mumbai and Pune offices.The following lawyers have been made Partner:Apoorva Kaushik | New DelhiAashdin Chivalwala | MumbaiDevika Alva | MumbaiGarima Agrawal | MumbaiKashish Mainkar | MumbaiKathleen Lobo | MumbaiMustaqueem Bagsaria | MumbaiPriya Desai | MumbaiShantanu Joshi | PuneCongratulating the new Partners, the Firm released a statement:"We want to express our deepest gratitude for your un
